title: Dimension Name Color
description: In tab bar, player's name color will change according to which dimension they're in
body:
## About the datapack

In tab bar, player name color will change based on which dimension they are in.

Compatible with "AFK Display" from [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/datapacks/) - AFK players will always have gray name.

## To uninstall:

`/function sadespresso:dimension_name_color/uninstall`
